title: fagelia mexicana
intro: Fagelia mexicana, also known as Mexican fagelia or Mexican fagelia vine, is a perennial climbing vine native to the tropical regions of Mexico and Central America, characterized by its woody stems and fragrant white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Fagelia mexicana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Fagelia mexicana is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies like tinctures and ointments, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
